title: carduus versicolor
intro: Carduus versicolor, also known as the variable thistle or thistle with variable inflorescence, is a plant species in the sunflower family with varying flower colors. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Carduus versicolor include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting the digestive system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or dried flower tea, and it is also used topically as a poultice to relieve skin irritations.
